CPMS - College Park Scholars-Media, Self and Society

CPMS100 College Park Scholars: Media, Self & Society First-Year Colloquium | (1 Credit)

Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to the media. Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Media, Self & Society (CPMS) program.

CPMS101 College Park Scholars: Media, Self & Society First-Year Colloquium II (1 Credit)
